title: Orochi no aramasa Katana
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword.
body:
For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

Rename your sword to "orochi no aramasa" to make it a katana. If you take the katana in your second hand, it will be sheathed.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f027e4c4fe8a95d547d9289dda903097d5d78f3.png)![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494b501c8ad84eaff0c5f482ae11751d119169bd.png)
